message:
refactor(runtime): migrate to table abstraction API across src modules

Update all src modules to use the new TaskTable/RegionTable/ObligationTable
APIs instead of direct Arena access. This completes the API migration for
production code paths.

Affected modules:
- scheduler/local_queue.rs: use tasks_arena() accessor
- scheduler/three_lane.rs: simplify task/region accessors, remove redundant borrows
- channel/watch.rs: use table methods instead of arena indexing
- sync/contended_mutex.rs: update lock tracking with new API
- lab/runtime.rs: migrate to table accessors
- lab/oracle/obligation_leak.rs: use obligation table methods
- obligation/lyapunov.rs: use obligation table methods
- observability/diagnostics.rs: use table iterators
- observability/task_inspector.rs: use table accessors
- plan/fixtures.rs: use table insert methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
